message:
fix: Extend test code mutation to recognize additional println patterns

The TestCodeChange::apply_change() function now recognizes the
"println!(\"rch self-test\");" pattern in addition to the existing
"Hello from test project!" pattern.

This ensures test projects using the self-test boilerplate can also
have unique changes injected for compilation fingerprinting during
E2E test runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
